description: Windows housekeeping subcommands: clean, temp-clean, hib-off, flp, add-user.

messages.adminRequired: Administrator elevation required. Re-launching with -Verb RunAs ...
messages.adminRelaunchFailed: Failed to re-launch elevated. Run this command from an Administrator PowerShell.

clean.stepDone: Step {n} done -- removed {count} item(s), freed {mb} MB, locked {locked}
clean.lockedHeader: Locked / un-removable files (skipped, will retry on next reboot or after closing the holding process)
clean.lockedTruncated: ... and {more} more locked file(s) not shown (limit: {limit}). See log file for full list.
clean.chocoCleanerFound: choco-cleaner detected -- running it as part of choco cache cleanup
clean.chocoCleanerNotFound: choco-cleaner not installed -- using manual choco cache sweep only
clean.chocoCleanStart: Cleaning Chocolatey cache (lib-bad, lib-bkp, *.backup, *.nupkg cache, %TEMP%\chocolatey) -- live install untouched
clean.chocoNotInstalled: Chocolatey not installed -- skipping choco cache cleanup

tempClean.header: Temp directories cleanup -- locked files will be reported, not crashed on
tempClean.perUserSweep: Sweeping per-user Temp folders under {root} ({count} user profile(s) found)

hibernate.offNoFile: Hibernation disabled. hiberfil.sys was not present (already off or never enabled).

power.header: Configuring Windows power timeouts (display + sleep + disk + hibernate)
power.schemeQueryFailed: Could not query active power scheme: {error}
power.allDone: Power settings updated. Display and sleep timeouts applied.

longPath.verifyFailed: Failed to set LongPathsEnabled at {path}. Current value: {current}

addUser.pinNotice: PIN '{pinMasked}' provided. Windows requires interactive PIN setup. Hint saved to '{hintFile}'. Sign in as '{name}' and use Settings -> Accounts -> Sign-in options to set the PIN.
addUser.pinHintWriteFailed: Failed to write PIN hint file at '{path}': {error}
addUser.emailNotice: Email '{email}' noted. To link a Microsoft account, '{name}' must sign in to Settings -> Accounts -> 'Sign in with a Microsoft account instead'.
addUser.msAccountNotice: Microsoft/Outlook email '{email}' associated with '{name}'. Linking is interactive: sign in as '{name}' and use Settings -> Accounts -> 'Sign in with a Microsoft account instead'.
addUser.msAccountRunOnceSet: Queued RunOnce 'ms-settings:emailandaccounts' for '{name}' (will open at first interactive logon).
addUser.msAccountRunOnceNoProfile: Could not queue RunOnce -- profile not loaded yet. Path: {path}. User '{name}' must sign in once before RunOnce can be set.

startup.missingAppPath: Missing <path>. Usage: .\run.ps1 os startup-add app <path> [--method ...] [--name N]
startup.missingEnvPair: Missing KEY=VALUE. Usage: .\run.ps1 os startup-add env KEY=VALUE [--scope user|machine]
startup.adminRequiredForMethod: Method '{method}' requires Administrator. Re-run elevated or pick a user-scope method.
startup.alreadyExistsOtherMethod: Entry '{name}' already exists via {existing}. Pass --force-replace to switch to {method}, or run startup-remove first.
startup.envBroadcast: Broadcast WM_SETTINGCHANGE -- new shells and Explorer will see {key} immediately.
startup.envBroadcastFailed: WM_SETTINGCHANGE broadcast failed: {error}. Sign out / sign in to apply {key}.
startup.removeNotFound: No managed entry named '{name}' found in any method.
